recommendations.title: Risen
recommendations.overview: Clavius, a powerful Roman military tribune, and his aide, Lucius, are tasked with solving the mystery of what happened to Jesus in the weeks following the crucifixion, in order to disprove the rumors of a risen Messiah and prevent an uprising in Jeru

recommendations.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
recommendations.overview: Nobleman crusader Robin of Locksley breaks out of a Jerusalem prison with the help of Moorish fellow prisoner Azeem and travels back home to England. But upon arrival he discovers his dead father in the ruins of his family estate, killed by the vicio

recommendations.title: The Beast
recommendations.overview: During the war in Afghanistan a Soviet tank crew commanded by a tyrannical officer find themselves lost and in a struggle against a band of Mujahadeen guerrillas in the mountains.

recommendations.title: Tristan & Isolde
recommendations.overview: An affair between the second in line to Britain's throne and the princess of the feuding Irish spells doom for the young lovers.

recommendations.title: One Eight Seven
recommendations.overview: After surviving a stabbing by a student, teacher Trevor Garfield moves from New York to Los Angeles. There, he resumes teaching as a substitute teacher.

recommendations.title: Fandango
recommendations.overview: In 1971, five college buddies from the University of Texas embark on a final road trip odyssey across the Mexican border before facing up to uncertain futures, in Vietnam and otherwise.

recommendations.title: Waterworld
recommendations.overview: In a futuristic world where the polar ice caps have melted and made Earth a liquid planet, a beautiful barmaid rescues a mutant seafarer from a floating island prison. They escape, along with her young charge, Enola, and sail off aboard his ship. But

recommendations.title: Rapa Nui
recommendations.overview: Inter-tribal rivalry leads to a competition to erect a huge Maoi statue in record time before Make can take part in the race to retrieve the egg of a Sooty Tern. The reward for winning this race is to rule the island for one year.

recommendations.title: The Count of Monte Cristo
recommendations.overview: Edmond Dantès becomes the target of a sinister plot and is arrested on his wedding day for a crime he did not commit. After 14 years in the island prison of Château d’If, he manages a daring escape. Now rich beyond his dreams, he assumes the identity
recommendations.director: Matthieu Delaporte, Alexandre de La Patellière
